mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (sender_id, receiver_id, content, message_type, target_id, media_url, conversation_id, is_read, comment_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{targetId}, #{mediaUrl}, #{conversationId}, #{isRead}, #{commentId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.content, m.message_type, m.target_id, m.media_url, m.is_read, m.created_at, u.nickname AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.content, m.message_type, m.target_id, m.media_url, m.is_read, m.created_at, u.nickname AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT m.id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.content, m.message_type, m.target_id, m.media_url, m.is_read, m.created_at, u.nickname AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT m.id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.content, m.message_type, m.target_id, m.media_url, m.is_read, m.created_at, u.nickname AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE ((m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{targetUserId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{targetUserId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId})) AND m.message_type = 1 ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE messages SET is_read = #{isRead}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE messages SET is_read = #{isRead}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0

SELECT m.id, m.sender_id, u.nickname AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar, m.content, m.target_id, v.title AS video_title, ms.cover_url AS video_cover, v.manuscript_id, v.video_order, m.is_read, m.created_at, m.comment_id, c.content AS comment_content, c.like_count, CASE WHEN ui.id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_liked FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id LEFT JOIN videos v ON m.target_id = v.id LEFT JOIN manuscripts ms ON v.manuscript_id = ms.id LEFT JOIN comments c ON m.comment_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user_interactions ui ON ui.target_id = c.id AND ui.target_type = 'COMMENT' AND ui.interaction_type = 'LIKE' AND ui.user_id = m.receiver_id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND m.message_type = 2 ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND message_type = 2 AND is_read = 0

SELECT m.id, m.sender_id, u.nickname AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar, m.content, m.target_id, v.title AS video_title, ms.cover_url AS video_cover, m.is_read, m.created_at FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id LEFT JOIN videos v ON m.target_id = v.id LEFT JOIN manuscripts ms ON v.manuscript_id = ms.id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND m.message_type = 3 ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND message_type = 3 AND is_read = 0

SELECT m.id, m.sender_id, u.nickname AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar, m.content, m.target_id, v.title AS video_title, ms.cover_url AS video_cover, v.manuscript_id, v.video_order, m.is_read, m.created_at FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id LEFT JOIN videos v ON m.target_id = v.id LEFT JOIN manuscripts ms ON v.manuscript_id = ms.id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND m.message_type IN (4, 6) ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND message_type IN (4, 6) AND is_read = 0

SELECT m.id, m.content, u.nickname AS sender_name, m.media_url, m.is_read, m.created_at FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND m.message_type = 5 ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND message_type = 5 AND is_read = 0
SELECT u.id FROM users u LEFT JOIN message_settings ms ON u.id = ms.user_id WHERE ms.user_id IS NULL OR ms.system_notify = 1
